/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/rt3.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/rt3.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rt3.dir/include/class/background.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rt3.dir/include/class/film.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rt3.dir/include/class/param.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rt3.dir/include/class/parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rt3.dir/include/class/util.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rt3.dir/include/class/api.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rt3.dir/include/class/ray.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rt3.dir/include/class/ortCamera.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rt3.dir/include/class/perCamera.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rt3.dir/include/class/sphere.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rt3.dir/ext/pugixml/src/pugixml.cpp.o -o rt3
